descriptionEn: Name means "let God be praised." There are many similar names and different spellings for "Juda": Judah, Judas, etc. This "Juda" KJV is found in the genealogy of Jesus in Luke as the son of Joseph. He was from Judah before the exile to Babylon.

verses.line: Which was the son of Simeon, which was the son of Juda, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Jonan, which was the son of Eliakim,
